title: Users may be unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online
impact: Users may be unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online.

updates.content:
Title: Some users are unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online

User impact: Users are unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online.

More info: Users will see the error: “This Message can’t be saved right now. Please try again later."
 
Users can send a new email message to the specific senders as a way to circumvent impact but are unable to respond directly to the existing thread.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Exchange Online and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Some users are unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online

User impact: Users are unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online.

More info: Users will see the error: “This Message can’t be saved right now. Please try again later."

Users can send a new email message to the specific senders as a way to circumvent impact but are unable to respond directly to the existing thread.

Current status: We're reviewing the logs and impact details provided by your organization to assist in our investigation into the underlying root cause of this event.

Scope of impact: Your organization is impacted by this event, and some users are unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online. This section may be updated as our investigation continues.

Title: Users may be unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online

User impact: Users may be unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online.

More info: Affected users see the following error: “This Message can’t be saved right now. Please try again later."

Affected users can send a new email message to the specific senders as a way to circumvent impact but are unable to respond directly to the existing thread.

Current status: We’ve reproduced the issue internally and are analyzing these reproductions alongside our service-side data to isolate the root cause and determine a fix.

Scope of impact: Impact is specific to some users who are served through the affected infrastructure, attempting to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online.

Next update by: Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 4:00 PM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online

User impact: Users may be unable to respond directly to specific encrypted email messages from a shared mailbox in Exchange Online.

Final status: After the initial investigation, we’ve determined that the issue is by-design and the service is healthy. A service incident did not actually occur. This communication will expire in 24 hours.
